verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite' phu Midian-te tungah la in. Tua khit ciangin na mipihte kiang na zuan ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in mite kiangah, “Midian-te' tungah Topa' phulakna a sem ding, Midian-te a do dingin note' lak panin mi pawlkhat galhiam guan' un
Israel minamte nam khat panin mi tul khat ciat gal sungah na kuansak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi tul tampi sung panin minam khatah tul khat, tul sawm leh tul nih galdo dingin galhiam kiguan' hi
Moses in amaute, minam khat panin tul khat ciat, biakinn nate leh pataukohna dingin peengkulte siampi Eleazar' tapa Finehas kengsakin ama makaihna tawh gal sungah a kuansak hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Midian-te do uh a, pasal khempeuh that uh hi
Amaute in midangte leh Midian kumpi ngate Evi, Rekem, Zur, Hur, leh Reba a thahna uhah, Beor' tapa Balaam zong namsau tawh that khawm uh hi
Israel-te in Midian nupite leh a tate uh manin, a bawngte, a tuuhonte khempeuh leh a na khempeuh uh laksak uh hi
Amau' ten'na a khuapi khempeuh uh leh a giahphual khempeuh uh mei tawh halsak uh a
a matsa khempeuh uh, mihing ganhing ciahpih khin uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in Jerikho nai, Jordan kiang, Moab zanglei-a a giahphual uha Moses leh siampi Eleazar leh Israel mihonte kiangah a galmatte uh leh a na lakte uh tun'pih uh hi
Moses, siampi Eleazar, leh mihon makaite khempeuh zong giahphual pua-ah vai dawn dingin pai uh hi
Galdona panin a hong ciah mi tul tampi a ukte leh mi za tampi a uk galkap uliante' tungah Moses heh hi
Moses in amaute tungah, “Numei khempeuh hingkhawi na hi uh hiam
En un, hih mite in Balaam' lamlahna tawh Peor-ah Topa' tungah Israel mite zuautatsak hi. Tua ahih manin Topa' mihonte lakah gimna hong tung hi
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, a khangnote lakah pasal peuhmah that un la, pasal tawh a lumkhawmsa numei peuhmah zong that un
Ahih hangin pasal tawh a lumkhawm nailo nungaknote khempeuh note-a' dingin kem un

Tu-in note lakah mi khat peuhpeuh a thatte leh a kithatsa a lawng mi peuhmahte, giahphual pua-ah ni sagih sung om un. A ni thum ni leh a ni sagih ni-in note leh na galmatte uh na kisian'suah ding uh hi
Puan khempeuh, savun tawh a kibawl na khempeuh, keel mul tawh a kibawl na khempeuh, leh sing tawh a kibawl na khempeuh na sian'suah ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Siampi Eleazar in galdona-ah a va kuan galkapte tungah, “ Topa in Moses a thupiak thukham ngeina hih bang ahi hi
Kham, ngun, sumngo, sik, dal, leh haknaw
mei a dozo peuhmahte bek mei-ah na hal ding uh a, a siang hi ding hi. Ahi zongin mei a do zolo peuhmahte, nitna sian'suahna tui tawh kisian'suah ding a, tui-ah na sawp ding uh hi
A ni sagih ni-in na puante uh na sawp ding uh a, note a siangtho na hi ding uh hi. Tua khit ciangin giahphualah nong ciahkik thei pan ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Nang leh siampi Eleazar leh mihon beh lutangte in gal sunga a kiman mihing leh ganhingte sim un
Gal sunga a kingahte khen nih suah in la, galdo dingin a kuan galhangte leh inn-a om mihonte tungah a kikimin hawmsak in
Galdo dingin a kuankhia galkapte' tung panin mite, bawngtalte, late, leh tuuhonte za nga ciangin Topa' siah dingin khat ciat la in
Alang a ngah uh sung panin la in la, Topa' tungah biakna-in siampi Eleazar tungah pia in
Israel mihonte in alang a ngah uh sung panin mite, bawngtalte, late, tuuhonte, ganhing khempeuh, sawmnga ciangin khat ciat la in la, Topa' biakbuk a kem Levi mite tungah pia in,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses leh siampi Eleazar in a sem uh hi
Tu-in galkapte in a lak gal sunga a mat uh a omlai a kihawm dingte: Tuu tul zaguk leh tul sawmsagih leh tul nga
bawng tul sawmsagih leh tul nih
la tul sawmguk leh tul khat
leh pasal tawh a lumkhawm nailo nungak a vekpi-in tul sawmthum leh tul nih ahi hi
Alang ahi, gal sungah a kuankhia mite' ngah pen tuu tul zathum leh tul sawmthum leh tul sagih leh zanga hi a
Topa' tuusiah pen tuu zaguk leh sawmsagih leh nga ahi hi
Bawngte tul sawmthum leh tul guk hi a, Topa' siah sawmsagih leh nih ahi hi
Late tul sawmthum leh zanga hi a, tua sung panin Topa' siah sawmguk leh khat ahi hi
Nungak tul sawm leh tul guk hi a, tua sung panin Topa' siah nungak sawmthum leh nih ahi hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin Moses in siampi Eleazar' tungah Topa biakna ding siah a pia hi
Galdo dingin a kuankhia mite-a' dingin Moses in a khenkhiat zah mah Israel mihonte in ngah uh a
mihonte in a ngah alang teng pen tuu tul zathum leh tul sawmthum leh tul sagih leh zanga
bawng tul sawmthum leh tul guk
la tul sawmthum leh zanga
nungak tul sawm leh tul guk ahi hi
Israel-te in a ngah alang sung panin Moses in mihing leh ganhing sawmnga ciangin khat ciat la-in, Topa in ama tungah a thupiak bangin Topa' biakbuk a kem Levi mite tungah a pia hi
Tua ciangin galkap tul tampite tunga uliante ahi, tul tampi a ukte leh za tampi a ukte, Moses kiangah hong pai uh a
“Kote' ukna nuai-a a om galkapte, na nasem kote in ka sim khin uh a, kote' kiang panin mi khat zong a pelhem omlo hi

Kote in Topa' mai-ah ko-a' dingin kilemna bawlna ding, Topa biakna dingin kham tawh a kibawl nate, banbuhte leh taute, min gelhna zungbuhte, bilbahte, leh khite ka muh ciat uh kong puak uh hi,” hong ci uh hi
Moses leh siampi Eleazar in amaute' tung panin na-a a kibawl khamte a sang uh hi
Tul tampi a ukte leh za tampi a ukte' tung panin a kingah, Topa' tungah biakna-in a piak uh khamte khempeuh shekel tul sawm leh tul guk leh za sagih leh sawmnga a gik hi
(Gal sunga a kuan mite in amau-a' ding ciat a la uh hi
Moses leh siampi Eleazar in tul tampi leh za tampi a uk mite' tung panin khamte sang uh a, Israel mite-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah phawk tawntungna-in kikhopna buk sungah a koih uh hi.
